title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation that teaches foundational AI and machine learning to school-aged students. The program provides research-backed lessons, videos, worksheets, and training designed for educators without computer science backgrounds, and has been deployed in over 165 countries.
